prompt:
You are shown one page from a SEC 10-K filing rendered as an image.
Item "13. Certain Relationships and Related Transactions, and Director Independence" ENDS on this page; the next section is "Item 14. Principal Accountant Fees and Services".
Locate the bottom edge of Item 13's text on the page.
- If the "Item 14" heading is visible on this page, then Item 13 ends on the line directly ABOVE that heading.
- Otherwise, Item 13 continues to the bottom of the page.
Then transcribe VERBATIM the LAST 5 lines of Item 13 immediately before it ends. These must be the FINAL lines right before the section ends, NOT lines from the top or middle of the page. Ignore running headers, page numbers, footers.
Output ONLY the transcribed text, no commentary, no quotes, no formatting.
